aiSignals.title: AI-Powered Signals

automation.title: Automation + Manual Trading
automation.desc: Execute trades automatically or use our signals for manual trading. Full control over your trading style and risk management.

analytics.desc: Track performance, analyze trades, and optimize strategies with our comprehensive analytics dashboard and reporting tools.

strategy.title: Choose Your Trading Channels
strategy.description: Access specialized AI-driven signal streams, each built for a specific strategy — from scalping and swing trading to momentum and automation.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.heading: Start Trading in 3 Simple Steps
gettingStarted.description: Get up and running in minutes. No complex setup required.

step1.title: Register & Connect
step1.desc: Securely link your exchange account via API. We support Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, Bybit, OKX, and more. Your funds stay on your exchange.

step2.title: Choose Signal Channels
step2.desc: Select from 8 AI-powered strategies based on your risk tolerance and trading goals. Combine multiple strategies for diversification.

step3.title: Trade & Monitor
step3.desc: Execute trades automatically or manually. Track performance in real-time with our advanced analytics dashboard.

tradingChannels.title: Trading Channels
tradingChannels.heading: Trade with Purpose, Not Guesswork
tradingChannels.description: Structured strategies powered by AI, designed to capture opportunities across volatility, trends, and market momentum.

scalping.title: Scalping
scalping.desc: Fast-response strategies built to capture short-term price movements and volatility spikes with rapid execution.

swing.title: Swing Trading
swing.desc: Structured strategies focused on medium-term trends and high-probability opportunities across major and altcoin markets.

aiStrategy.title: AI Strategy
aiStrategy.desc: Flagship AI-driven strategy analyzing market structure, sentiment, and volatility to identify dominant market setups.

lowRisk.title: Low Risk
lowRisk.desc: Simplified trading signals designed for guided execution and controlled exposure, ideal for beginners and steady trading.

highRisk.title: High Risk High Reward
highRisk.desc: Aggressive strategies targeting strong price expansions and high-momentum trading opportunities.

futures.title: Futures
futures.desc: Advanced strategies focused on structured execution, systematic signals, and portfolio-level risk control.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyUs.heading: Built for Serious Traders
whyUs.description: We obsess over the details so you can focus on what matters: profitable trading.

security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.desc: Your API keys are encrypted with AES-256. We never have withdrawal access to your funds.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.desc: Real-time performance tracking. See every trade, every P&L, every detail. No hidden fees.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.desc: Detailed reports, trade history, and performance metrics to optimize your strategy.

execution.title: Instant Execution
execution.desc: Sub-second trade execution ensures you never miss an opportunity in fast markets.
